criteria.name: functional_constitution_created
criteria.description: Agent creates .pipeline/constitution.md with correct YAML frontmatter including tier: functional

criteria.name: platform_independence
criteria.description: Functional constitution contains NO platform-specific references (no React, TypeScript, Jest, Playwright, npm, etc.)

criteria.name: domain_rules_present
criteria.description: Functional constitution includes domain rules referencing standard/schema compliance matching the input domain

criteria.name: implementation_profile_created
criteria.description: Agent creates .pipeline/profiles/{platform}.md with correct YAML frontmatter including tier: implementation and platform: {platform}

criteria.name: profile_references_constitution
criteria.description: Implementation profile references .pipeline/constitution.md and instructs agents to read both

criteria.name: committed
criteria.description: Agent commits both files with an appropriate commit message
